label: Exact Entity Masking
description: Safe placeholder names used to verify deterministic name-to-alias replacement without false positives.

cases.label: Single configured person name
cases.input: Jane Smith approved the discharge summary.

cases.label: Two configured names with stable alias order
cases.input: Robert Brown reviewed the chart with Jane Smith.
cases.expected: Entity_B reviewed the chart with Entity_A.

cases.label: Embedded partial match does not trigger
cases.input: Janet Smithson approved the discharge summary.
cases.expected: Janet Smithson approved the discharge summary.

cases.label: Unrelated surname remains visible
cases.input: Dr. Smythe reviewed the chart at noon.
cases.expected: Dr. Smythe reviewed the chart at noon.
